app.name: CryptoVault
app.description: Protect your data with modern encryption algorithms

common.dragDrop: Drag & drop or click to select

home.textEncryptionDesc: Encrypt and decrypt text using AES, DES, 3DES, Blowfish, RC4, Rabbit, and RSA.
home.imageEncryptionDesc: Protect your images with strong encryption. Supports PNG, JPG, GIF, and WEBP.
home.hashingDesc: Generate secure hash values to verify data integrity.
home.keyGeneratorDesc: Generate RSA keys and other keys needed for modern encryption.
home.supportedAlgorithmsDesc: Industry-standard encryption algorithms at your fingertips
home.multiLanguageDesc: Available in Vietnamese and English. More languages coming soon.
home.openSourceDesc: Source code available on GitHub for transparency and community contributions.
home.quickStartGuideDesc: Start encrypting in just 3 simple steps
home.chooseAlgorithmDesc: Select from various encryption algorithms based on your security needs.
home.enterDataDesc: Input your text or upload files you want to encrypt or hash.
home.getResultDesc: Copy or download your encrypted data, hash, or generated keys.

documentation.title: Documentation Guide
documentation.subtitle: Detailed instructions for all features
documentation.introText: CryptoVault is a comprehensive encryption tool providing multiple encryption algorithms to protect your data. All encryption is performed in your browser, ensuring your data never leaves your device.
featureList: Image encryption to protect visual data
RSA and ECC key pair generation
Fully client-side - data never leaves your device
encryptSteps: Enter text you want to encrypt
Enter a strong secret key (at least 12 characters)
Copy or download the encrypted text
decryptSteps: Select the same algorithm used for encryption
documentation.aesDescription: AES (Advanced Encryption Standard) is a widely used symmetric encryption algorithm. AES-256 uses a 256-bit key, providing very high security.
documentation.desDescription: DES (Data Encryption Standard) is an older encryption algorithm using a 56-bit key. It is not secure for modern use but is kept for educational purposes.
documentation.rsaDescription: RSA is an asymmetric encryption algorithm using public/private key pairs. RSA-2048 is the industry standard.
documentation.eccDescription: ECC (Elliptic Curve Cryptography) provides equivalent security to RSA with shorter keys, making it more efficient.
documentation.shaDescription: SHA (Secure Hash Algorithm) generates fixed-size hash values from input data. SHA-256 is the current standard.
documentation.securityText: All encryption happens in your browser. Data is never sent to any server. However, please ensure:
securityTips: Use HTTPS when accessing the tool
passwordTips: Include at least one special character

algorithms.aes256gcm: Advanced Encryption Standard with Galois/Counter Mode
algorithms.aes256ecb: AES with Electronic Codebook (not recommended for multiple blocks)

about.title: About CryptoVault
about.description: CryptoVault is a comprehensive encryption tool designed to help users protect their data using modern encryption algorithms.
about.privacyText: All encryption happens in your browser. Data never leaves your device.
about.openSourceText: Source code is available on GitHub for inspection and contribution.
about.algorithmsDesc: Comprehensive list of supported encryption and hashing algorithms
about.featureTextEncryptionDesc: Encrypt and decrypt text using industry-standard algorithms.
about.featureImageEncryptionDesc: Secure your images with strong encryption methods.
about.featureHashingDesc: Generate hash values for data integrity verification.
about.featureKeyGenerationDesc: Generate RSA and ECC key pairs for asymmetric encryption.

errors.decryptionFailed: Decryption failed. Check your key and algorithm.
errors.weakPassword: Password too weak. Use at least 12 characters.

footer.clientSideNotice: All encryption is performed client-side. Your data never leaves your device.
